title: DecisionRequest
description: A normalized authorization request submitted to the policy engine. Protocol-specific fields must not appear here; adapters are responsible for normalization before this structure is constructed.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this request. Used to correlate the request with its DecisionResponse and AuditEvent.

subject_id.description: Stable identifier of the requesting subject. For human subjects: JWT sub claim. For device subjects: device certificate CN or device identifier.

subject_roles.description: Role names held by the subject at request time.

subject_attrs.description: Additional subject attributes for ABAC policy conditions. Keys and values are strings.

resource_id.description: Normalized resource identifier in the format '{type}:{qualifier[:{subqualifier}...]}'. Examples: 'hvac:zone-a', 'sensor:co2:lobby', 'device:chiller-1'.

action.description: Action name in the format '{verb}:{domain}[:{object}]'. Examples: 'write:hvac:setpoint', 'read:audit:log', 'subscribe:telemetry'.

context.description: Key/value context for policy conditions. Examples: site, maintenance_window, operational_mode.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the request was constructed.
